title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Bosch India Software

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Bosch India Software
jsonLd.description:
Bosch India Software, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Noida operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Bosch India Software:
Bosch India Software is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bosch India Software!
